summary: Phase A (iter29) validation: Top 3 hosts endpoint + widget, Services toggles (Crypto OFF / Ads ON / Offers ON), Transport driver KYC + emergency phone gating. Backend 7/8 pytest + manual DB-seeded flow (403/400/200 all verified). Frontend E2E via Playwright: all new selectors rendered correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: routes/transport.py driver/register gating is correct: HTTPException detail starts with 'KYC_REQUIRED:driver' (403) and 'EMERGENCY_PHONE_REQUIRED' (400) as specified.
routes/pro.py top-hosts: SQL groups by user fields and orders by earned_usd DESC — LGTM. Returns [] when no revshare rows, also LGTM.

database.py migrations (lines 588–598) idempotently add drivers columns vehicle_model/vehicle_plate/rating/total_rides/emergency_contact_phone/emergency_contact_name/status/suspended_reason — confirmed via successful /driver/register INSERT and /driver/me response.
Minor: top-hosts endpoint serializes earned_usd as string (Decimal→str). Consistent with other endpoints but the frontend ProPage uses formatMoney which handles both — OK.

success_rate.backend: 100% (7 passed, 1 skipped replaced by manual DB-seed verification covering 400+200 paths)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (all expected selectors rendered: service-crypto hidden, service-ads/offers visible, ads-page+ads-plan-0/1/2 rendered, JobsModule offersMode, pro-page loads with top-hosts hidden on empty data, driver-kyc-banner+emergency-phone+submit-driver with correct disabled text)

test_credentials: admin@japap.com / JapapAdmin2024! — working. KYC approval seeded via direct SQL (kyc_id='kyc_test_admin'); cleaned up after tests.
seed_data_creation: Temporarily inserted approved KYC row for admin user to verify EMERGENCY_PHONE_REQUIRED (400) and successful driver register (200). Cleaned up after (DELETE drivers + kyc_verifications).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase A Backend+Frontend fully validated. All 3 deliverables green. For Phase B, reuse admin login + use /api/settings/public to check new flags. To test top-hosts with data, INSERT into referral_rewards_log (role='connect_revshare') rows for 3 distinct users with varying amount_usd then GET /api/pro/top-hosts?limit=3 as any logged-in user.
rca of the issue: No issues found. Code and tests confirm spec compliance.
